diagrams.title: Search Tree for BFS vs DFS
diagrams.description: Shows how BFS expands level by level (left) while DFS goes deep along one branch (right)
diagrams.purpose: Understand difference between breadth-first and depth-first exploration patterns

diagrams.title: A* Search Evaluation Function
diagrams.description: Visual breakdown of f(n) = g(n) + h(n) showing components at each node
elements: Node label shows: g(cost from start), h(heuristic), f(total)
Shows how A* prioritizes nodes with lowest f-value
Demonstrates path cost accumulation and heuristic estimation
diagrams.purpose: Learn how A* makes expansion decisions by combining actual and estimated costs

diagrams.title: 8-Puzzle State Space
diagrams.description: Initial, intermediate, and goal states of 8-puzzle with possible moves
elements: Goal: 1,2,3 top row, 4,5,6 middle, 7,8 blank bottom
diagrams.purpose: Understand state representation and successor generation in discrete puzzles

diagrams.title: Hill Climbing Local Maxima Problem
diagrams.description: Shows hill climbing getting stuck at local maximum instead of global maximum
elements: X-axis: state space, Y-axis: objective function value
Starting point, path taken by hill climbing
diagrams.purpose: Understand limitations of local search and why backtracking is needed

visuals.title: Problem Solving Agents
visuals.description: Visual diagram for problem solving agents
